title: maesa carolinensis var. carolinensis
intro: Maesa carolinensis var. carolinensis, also known as Wild Plumeria or Mok Mok, is a plant species belonging to the family Primulaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are believed to aid in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Maesa carolinensis var. carolinensis include reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and protecting against oxidative stress, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
